sutta: once when the assaulted 1 dwelled near raja gaha on mount valter 2 devas of surpassing loveliness lighting up almost the whole peak approached and the exalted 1 at the passing of the night saluted him and stood at 1 side and standing there 1 day said lord these nuns are freed and the other said lord these nuns are wholly freed and out and without attached remainder thus those devas and the master approved and seeing that they saluted the exalted 1 and keeping him on their right vanished from i'll just stop here for a moment to commend you notice even though the buddha had psychic power quite often the devas heavenly beings they would come and inform the buddha about certain things that were happening around and that is because even though the buddha has psychic power he did not make any effort not to know what was going around him because usually he'd abide in meditation he'll bite in ghana and he is being a person who is liberated now he doesn't worry about the world but sometimes he does worry about his disciples then he'll go and give advice to his disciples sometimes then the suta continues at dawn the exalted 1 told the monks all that had taken place now at that time the wearable maha mugulana sat near the exalted 1 and he thought what devas know the partly attached as partly attached the only detached as wholly detailed about then a monk named tisa had recently died and had arisen in 1 of the brahma worlds and there they knew him as brahmatisa the mighty the very powerful and the variable maha mauglana as a strong man might stretch forth his bent arm or bend his outstretched arm vanished from mount valcharpi and appeared in that brahma world and brahmatisa saw the vulnerable 1 from afar coming along and on seeing him said come worthy welcome worthy mughal it's been long indeed since you made this round that is to say came here be seated ready sir here on this seat made ready and the wearable maha muggalana sat down on the seat made ready and brahmatisa after paying homage to him also sat down at 1 side and the verbal maha muglana said to brahmatisa that's eaten to what devas jisa is there this knowledge as to being partly unattached he is that as to being holy unattached he is dead and brahmatisa said the brahmadeva hosts worthy mughlana have this knowledge what have they all this knowledge no word is those devas who are satisfied with brahma life brahma beauty brahma happiness brahma pump brahma power and know not to escape from it to the beyond as there really is they have not this knowledge as to being partly unattached is that as being holy unattached he is dead but those devas of the brahma host who are not so satisfied i know they escape to the beyond they have this knowledge considered considered worthy mawlana the man who is freed both ways of him those devas know thus this reverencer is freed both ways and so long as his body lasts devas and men shall see him but on the breaking up of the body they shall not see him and thus it is very sir that these devas have the knowledge as to being unattached he is that and just stop here to command so you see this went to consult the brahmatisa it might be that this deva was formerly a disciple of the parable maha maugalana that is why the verbal maha mogul seems to be very early with him when to consult him and brahmatis paid respect to the vulnerable maha magalana and in the previous suta anguta nikaya 6.4.34 we also read about how variable maha mogulana consulted this same brahmatisa about how many devas have entered the stream now here uh the brahmatisa is talking about the first type of arya the both ways of both ways liberated this fleet both ways or both ways liberated refers to the arahanda who is liberated by mind and liberated by wisdom and also called an arahant liberated by mind then he continues again consider him who is liberated by wisdom they know of him the same consider the man who is a body witness kaya saki of him they know this reference is a body witness perhaps by practicing things proper as to sleeping and sitting having fellowship with good friends controlling the faculties he may enter and abide in that consummation beyond all of the holy life realizing it here and now by his own knowledge for the sake of which clansmen rightly go forth from the home to the homeless life and thus it is worthy sir that these devas have the knowledge as of being partly unattached he is that consider him who is a view winner of you attainer niti pato and then the faith released sadavi and then the dhamma follower dhamma nosarin of each they know this reverencer is such a 1 and perhaps by practicing things proper they may enter and abide in the consummation beyond all of the holy life and thus these devas know as to being partly unattached he is dead i'll stop here again to command the first 2 are the free both ways or liberated both ways and liberated by mine refers to the to the arahant and the wholly unattached but the others mentioned here they are [Music] arya who have not completed their work so because of that they are partly unattached not wholly unattached according to the angutra nikaya 3.3.21 the body witness and then the view attainer and the faith released either saka dakang sakadagamin anagaming [Music] the second fruition third fruition or the fourth path arya and sutra continues and the verbal maha mogalana delighted pleased by brahmatisa's words as a strong man might bend his arm to and fro vanish from the brahma world and appeared on mount vulture p and he approached the exalted 1 saluted him and sat down at 1 side and seated thus the verbal maha mogalana related to the exalted 1 all that time that he had with brahmatisa and buddha said but brahmatisa did not teach you the seventh person mawlana the dweller in the sign list and the verb said now is the time of blessed 1 now is the time for welfare for the exalted 1 to teach concerning the dweller in the signless the monks would hear and remember therefore mughlana listened beheed i will speak his lord rejoined the vulnerable mahabhuglana and the exalted 1 said consider mughlana the monk who by inattention to all signs enters and abides in signless mental concentration of him those gave us no this reference abides in signless mental concentration perhaps by practicing things proper as to sleeping and sitting having fellowship with good friends and control of the faculties he may enter and abide in that consummation beyond all of the holy life realizing it here now by his own knowledge for the sake of which clansmen rightly go forth from the home to the homeless life and thus it is moglana that these devas have the knowledge as to being partly unattached he is that at the end of the sutta
commentary: here the brahmatisa mentioned about the 6 types of arya he left out then the last 1 not mentioned is the saddam the faith follower he did not mention but uh the nusarin the dharma follower and the sadhana sarin the faith follower uh first part athenas according to the sanghita nikaya 25.1 and then the buddha talked in the end about the 1 who abides in sinless mental concentration signless mental concentration is that concentration of mind which is not attached to any sign which does not have any sign any object in the mind now the next suta is
